sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111888" key="foberopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοβερο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n111888.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make formidable,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
